attributes.Sql Query:

WCO.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID, WCO.SK_CCW_ORDER_ID_INT, WCO.CCW_ORDER_NAME, WCO.CCW_ORDER_SOURCE_CD, WCO.CCW_ORDER_STATUS_INT, WCO.CCW_ORDER_VERSION_INT, WCO.FULFILLMENT_ORG_KEY, WCO.PARTIAL_ORDER_FLG, WCO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME, WCO.CCW_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM, WCO.BK_QUOTE_NUM, WCO.SUBMITTED_BY_NAME, WCO.SUBMITTED_BY_PROXY_NAME, WCO.SUBMITTED_ON_DTM, WCO.DV_SUBMITTED_ON_DT, WCO.UPDATED_BY_NAME, WCO.UPDATED_ON_DTM, WCO.DV_UPDATED_ON_DT, WCO.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG, WCO.CCW_ORDER_SOURCE_ORG_TYPE_CD, WCO.CCW_ORDER_REASON_TYPE_CD, WCO.CREATED_BY_USER, WCO.CREATED_BY_PROXY_USER, WCO.CCW_ORDER_CREATED_DTM, WCO.DV_CCW_ORDER_CREATED_DT, WCO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD, WCO.BK_DEAL_ID, WCO.FLXBL_SERVICE_START_DAYS_CNT, WCO.FLXBL_SERVICE_ELIGIBILITY_FLG, WCO.CCW_ORDER_ON_HOLD_FLG, WCO.INTENDED_USE_TYPE_CD, WCO.XAAS_ORDER_FLG, WCO.PROCESS_NEXT_STEP_CD, WCO.BK_START_TV_DT,DV_ORDER_STATUS_CODE ,
TOTAL_EFFECTIVE_DISCOUNT_PCT, WCO.EDW_CREATE_DTM, WCO.EDW_CREATE_USER, WCO.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, WCO.EDW_UPDATE_USER , WCO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
